### Product Information

- Restore and protect your tires!

- SIO2 tire coating protects for months, not weeks

- Helps restore a deep matte finish

- Extremely hydrophobic!

- Keeps tires cleaner and for longer

- Product Code: GY-0803

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

88% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 33 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Gyeon Tire will restore and protect your tires with one easy to use formula! After you polish your paint and protect it with a coating, the deep, glossy, clarity of the paint is really a thing of beauty. This finish makes your vehicle stand out, but if you have ugly dull tires next to this paint, it just takes away from the overall luster of the vehicle. Gyeon set out to take that same feeling we get when looking at our paint and putting it into a product for your tires. Gyeon Tire, is a SIO2 coating that leaves behind a great deal of protection and gloss, along with restoring your tire back to its natural deep matte luster. Do not confuse this product with a typical tire dressing, Gyeon Gyeon Tire is a coating through and through. It lasts months, not weeks like other dressings and the ability to repel water from the surface of the rubber it simply put, outstanding. This beading is only rivaled by the coating on your paint and it helps keep your tire cleaner for much longer. This is incredibly valuable as tires are the only part of the vehicle touching the ground, meaning that they are coming into contact with dirt, grime, UV rays, and other tough contamination. When you wash your tires, you will find that most contamination will roll off the surface, saving you valuable detailing time and effort. What are you left with you ask, just think of a deep, dark, matte looking tire with a durable layer of protection to boot. Allow your tires to stand out from the crowd with Gyeon Tire!

### Videos

#### GYEON Q Tire

#### Q2Tire

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Long term tyre protection.


**


- UV protection

- Factory fresh look

- Self-cleaning properties
**


#### Directions

Use Q2M TireCleaner and Q2M TireBrush ro clean the tyre. Rinse well. Let the tyre fully dry before application. Apply with Q2M Tire Applicator and wipe it onto the surface. Let it dry and soak into the surface. For a deep matte effect wipe after 15 minutes with a microfibre cloth. To increase durability heat the surface with a heat gun prior to application. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Robert M. on 2/3/2023

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Great product, they need to sell this in a larger container.

Reviewed by Ashley J. on 9/9/2022

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Really liking this tire shine so far. My go-to has been Poorboy's World Bold'n'Bright for years. It provides a great, satin sheen and looks good for 2-3 weeks, but does wash off easily in a rainstorm. I decided to give this a try when it was on sale, as I've heard good things. 



I tried this out on my daily drivers, truck and suv. I did my truck first, after a very thorough cleaning and drying of the tire. I applied to the sidewall, rubbed in after 15 mins and let sit for about 2 days. Apparently I applied too much as I had sling off; first time ever in 3 years of ownership. For the SUV, i applied less product, let sit half an hour, and REALLY buffed it in, then did not drive for 24 hours. I had no sling off. 



There is a great shine to the tires now. It's more than satin but not super glossy. Has been about 2 weeks now with no loss of shine, The truck has been outside and the SUV just went through some rain storms. Water just beads off as well. Product seems to work really well after a good cleaning and LESS IS MORE when applying to tire.

Reviewed by marcelo c. on 5/25/2022

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I have tried many different tire dressings , this is absolutely my favorite! It is a bit more work on application but definitely a nice look and decent longevityâ€¦..
